_model_help: Model the headless drain uses to draft (same skills either way). Set 'claude-opus-4-8' for top quality matching the desktop app; omit to use the claude CLI default (lighter/cheaper).
_claudeOauthToken_help: Long-lived OAuth token from `claude setup-token` — uses your Claude SUBSCRIPTION (Max plan), NOT the pay-per-token API. REQUIRED for the headless drain because launchd can't read the macOS keychain; the worker passes it to claude via CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN and strips ANTHROPIC_API_KEY so the subscription always wins. Regenerate ~yearly.
_autoEvents_help: When enabled, a dated request for clientId is auto-extracted (Opus), pushed onto the site's src/content/events.json (siteDir, must be a clean checkout on main), and a fully-automatic day-of 8AM ET post is scheduled. Leave disabled until the site dir + git push are verified.
_sites_help: Deterministic website-deploy lane (worker/site-apply.mjs), keyed by clientId. On approval of a `type:website` request the worker applies the drain's staged files (worker/out/<id>/scratch/ + manifest.json) into `dir` (a clean checkout on main), commits ONLY those files, pushes main, then polls `liveUrl` for the manifest's verify assertions and marks the request done ONLY once confirmed live. Omit or leave empty to keep website changes on the old drain path.
_schedule_help: Food-truck scheduling lane for a site (worker/schedule-sync.mjs + daily-truck-post.mjs + monthly-truck-post.mjs). schedule-sync builds src/content/schedule.json from the backend's bookings[]/vendors[] and deploys it via the same push+verify lane as site-apply. projectVendors MUST stay false until the vendor registry is seeded with the full 36-vendor directory — projecting from the ~4 seed rows would OVERWRITE and delete the live 36-vendor vendors.json. postizChannels is empty until the Eats FB/IG channel names are confirmed; while empty, live daily/monthly posting is NOT wired (the render+publish stay dry-run seams) — fill it in to activate. defaultHours backs a booking that has no start/end; dailyPostTime/monthlyDraftDay drive the daily/monthly post time-gates. autoApproveDaily defaults FALSE (safe rollout): the day-of post is drafted and waits for Marshall's approval in the Desk until he flips it true; the MONTHLY post is ALWAYS Marshall-approved regardless. autoApproveCancelPosts gates the 'they canceled' announcement lane (worker/cancel-posts.mjs): the portal's cancel button submits a marked post request that queues for drafting on the next tick regardless; FALSE = the drafted post waits in the Desk for approval, TRUE = it auto-approves and publishes ASAP once drafted.

push._help: mode: 'ntfy' (url = https://ntfy.sh/your-topic, title sent as a header) | 'json' (POST {title,message} to url) | 'off'. Point this at the same push you already use for the Postiz guardian. Every push deep-links to the Desk (tapping the notification opens the queue); 'click' overrides the default GH Pages Desk URL. Failure pushes go out ntfy Priority high + a warning tag.
